name: Dougong eave bracket band
description: A decorative dougong corbel band around the footprint perimeter near the wall top: each bracket an @accent block carried on an outward-facing stair, evoking the interlocking timber brackets that carry an East-Asian eave. Composes under an asian_roof.
placement_rules: Sits one course under the eave shelf, around the whole perimeter.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.temple_eave_bracket.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
